details.test: Task 1: Request residential interior quote for 3 rooms with eco paint if under $1,200
Task 2: Schedule earliest commercial exterior consultation after 15th next month 9am–1pm
Task 3: Choose cheaper interior package that includes ceiling painting and start booking
Task 4: Save two recent exterior apartment projects near ZIP 94110 to favorites
Task 5: Save three paint color trend articles from last 2 years to reading list
Task 6: Select best-value commercial maintenance plan under $400/month with longest warranty
Task 7: Configure exterior house painting quote with required add-ons under $5,000
Task 8: Book earliest weekday evening priority interior appointment in next 30 days
Task 9: Add 4 gallons of first zero-VOC interior eggshell paint under $60 to quote cart
